mapper.sql: id, flow_id, business_type, business_id, applicant_id, applicant_name, status, current_node, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by, completed_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_approval_record_t WHERE business_type = #{businessType} AND business_id = #{businessId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_approval_record_t SET status = #{status}, current_node = #{currentNode}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE openplatform_v2_approval_record_t SET status = #{status}, current_node = #{currentNode}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_approval_record_t WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_approval_record_t WHERE business_type = #{businessType} AND business_id = #{businessId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
